independent_rationale: No public static counterexample closes L5 or runtime failure.
Boundary or domain failure cannot be localized statically.
Non-bracket policy or another hidden boundary remains unclosed.
Public text and preserved outcomes do not close contiguous vs noncontiguous semantics.
Third-parameter contract or first plus tuple is needed.
Signed/small-value representation cannot be inferred from undisclosed plus failure.
Public text and preserved outcomes do not close sublist semantics.
